results.title: Acme Vendor Solutions – Intake & Onboarding
results.snippet: Explore Acme's cloud offerings, data storage across US and EU regions, 99.9% uptime, and seamless onboarding process.

pages.title: Acme Vendor Solutions – Intake & Onboarding
pages.content: Welcome to Acme Vendor Solutions. We provide enterprise‑grade cloud infrastructure covering compute, storage, and managed networking. All customer data is stored in our secure data centres located in the United States and the European Union, helping you meet regional residency requirements. Our platform comes with a 99.9% uptime SLA for core services – see our performance guarantee for details. Onboarding is fast: submit your company profile and a technical contact, and we will provision your environment within 48 hours. For security posture, we adhere to NIST and ISO frameworks and undergo annual third‑party audits, though a formal customised security SLA is not offered at this time. Any questions? Reach out to our intake team at intake@acme‑vendor.example.com.
